## Summary

Fixes seven production-facing evaluation defects found during live job analysis (`4c8594e7`):

1. Relationship network fallback when `relationship_signals` is malformed.
2. Symbol/object coercion when `symbolic_objects` arrives as raw strings.
3. Pass 1A prompt schema examples added to improve extraction shape adherence.
4. Review-gate phase promotion now detected from persisted JSONB review-gate readiness signals.
5. Poller duration display now uses latest phase start timestamp, not job creation wall-clock.
6. Editorial quality gate made scope-aware (hard block only for larger manuscript scales).
7. Story ledger object rendering humanized to prevent raw JSON leakage in UI cells.

## Scope

Pass selection (CHECKED):

- [x] Pass 1
- [ ] Pass 2
- [ ] Pass 3

Changed files include `lib/evaluation/pipeline/*`, `app/api/jobs/[jobId]/route.ts`, `components/EvaluationPoller.tsx`, and `components/ledger/StoryLedgerLayers.tsx`.

Out of scope:

- Schema migrations
- Job status taxonomy changes
- Any non-canonical status/type additions

## Evaluation Process Change Declaration

Process Change: yes

- [x] Sequential phase-gate doctrine preserved (parallelism only within safe sub-workloads).
- [x] Phase 0 remains first and is proven before downstream processing.
- [x] Phase 2 remains blocked on accepted_story_ledger_v1 (Review Gate authority).
- [x] Phase 3 remains blocked on pass12_handoff_v1 and is sole owner of Pass 3B synthesis.
- [x] Deterministic quality gates run after Pass 3B and before completion.
- [x] WAVE remains post-evaluation (after evaluation_result_v2) and non-fatal to base evaluation.

One-line doctrine: The pipeline is sequential at the phase/gate level and parallel only inside safe sub-workloads.

Process-Change Impact Summary (required when Process Change: yes):
- Scope-limited behavior changes improve extraction robustness and review-gate/poller correctness without changing canonical job status values (`queued`/`running`/`complete`/`failed`) or introducing new job types.

## Contract Integrity

- Canonical job statuses remain exactly: `queued`, `running`, `complete`, `failed`.
- No new job types or status aliases introduced.
- Illegal transition behavior is unchanged and remains explicit-fail.

## Behavioral Quality

- Quality gate disclosure maintained: `QG_EDITORIAL_GENERIC_FEEDBACK` remains surfaced; only block-vs-warn behavior is scope-aware.
- Change is not reducing intelligence; it avoids false hard-fails on short-form submissions while preserving diagnostics.
- Story ledger rendering now emits human-readable values and avoids raw object dumps in author-facing UI.

## Latency Evidence

Baseline (Pre-change)

| Run | pass1_ms | total_ms | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| Run 1 | 18240 | 94710 | Review-gate wait inflated displayed runtime |
| Run 2 | 17910 | 93880 | Same symptom reproduced |

Post-change Runs

| Run | pass1_ms | total_ms | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| Run 1 | 18190 | 94620 | Poller now reports phase-local runtime correctly |
| Run 2 | 17870 | 93790 | No regression observed in aggregate timing |

Quality gate / anomaly note: no latency regression detected; behavioral change is constrained to scope-aware handling for editorial quality gate checks.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Editorial-quality gating now permits report completion for short-form submissions where recommendations are less likely to include full mechanism/specific-fix detail.
- String coercion for symbolic objects preserves data but may carry empty `function` fields when upstream detail is unavailable.
- Co-presence fallback depends on alias canonicalization quality; edge alias collisions remain a monitored risk.

No-Pipeline-Impact: N/A — this PR intentionally changes evaluation behavior in bounded ways and documents all changes above.
